:::{.landing-footer}
:::{.landing-footer__meta}
By SciLifeLab Training Hub. Licensed under CC BY 4.0.

Built with Quarto and hosted on GitHub Pages.
:::

:::{.landing-footer__actions}
[GitHub repository](https://github.com/SciLifeLab-Training/scilifelab-training-template-staging){.landing-footer__repo-link aria-label="GitHub repository"}
:::
:::
